UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-22-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Annlia Paganini Hill is present. Represented by
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jennifer Elmore is present.
Attorney Ryan Casamiquela representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Amanda Ebey, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Aug -27-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
